sevenDayForecast.headline: Tropical low expected to form in the Coral Sea this week.
points: A tropical low (17U) is expected to form in the northern Coral Sea tonight or on Thursday.
It is expected to be slowly moving southwards initially, while remaining offshore. Later in the weekend or early next week, 17U may move further east, away from the coast.
There is a Low chance of 17U developing into a tropical cyclone from Friday, while it is located off the northeast Queensland coast.
A second low may be developing near or east of Cape York Peninsula during the weekend. If this eventuates then a separate forecast will be issued for this system.
Residents of far north Queensland should monitor forecasts for updates.
